summary: Iteration 15 — validated Feature D (Print MCL), Feature E (BOM menu + RBAC), Bonus (plan_delivery_date). 13/13 backend tests passed; frontend E2E validated across engineer/admin/store roles.

minor.issue: log_action is called without await (fire-and-forget coroutine, generates RuntimeWarning). Non-blocking to functionality but audit log for print_mcl will not be recorded.

action_items: Optional: await log_action(...) in /store/incoming/mcl/{receipt_id} (backend/routers/store.py line ~930) to ensure MCL print events are audit-logged.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/routers/store.py L930: `log_action(...)` invoked without await — coroutine is never scheduled. Every other call site awaits it. Add `await`.
backend/routers/bom.py delete_bom (L327-334) is fine but could log the deleted so_no/rev; currently details={} — low priority.
BOM upload: file size cap 10MB and content read into memory before parse — acceptable for the template size.
seed_data_creation: TEST_MCL_Vendor / TEST_MCL_Item_0..2 receipts created for MCL grouping (persisted, source='manual'). SO 005221 gained additional Rev.2 (or higher) uploads from engineer01. Admin annotations for items 1 & 2 re-saved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend cookie-based auth confirmed (session cookies, not Bearer). BOM.xls at /tmp/bom/BOM.xls is stable. MCL template preserved. New TEST_MCL_* store_receipts left in DB — safe to remove if needed.
rca of the issue: No blocker bugs found. Only minor: `log_action` missing `await` in print_mcl endpoint — coroutine is created but not awaited, producing a warning and dropping the audit entry. Fix: prepend `await` on line ~930 of /app/backend/routers/store.py.
